name: Track Anarchy
author: seanyushoumori
description:
Track Anarchy removes Subway Builder's construction limits for every train type.

**Removed limits:**
  - removed minimum curve radius — on track *and* through stations
  - removed the maximum grade / slope cap
  - removed track, station & tunnel clearance (they can overlap)
  - removed minimum parallel-track spacing (tracks can stack on top of each other)
  - removed the build-height floor & ceiling (−100 m / +20 m → effectively unlimited)
  - removed the building-foundation gap (tunnel flush under buildings)
  - removed minimum & maximum station lengths
  - removed minimum & maximum track segment lengths
  - removed at-grade road-crossing barriers

**Still Enforced:** (hard coded by game, if anyone figures out a way to bypass, let me know)
  - stations must start & end at the same level
  - different track types still can't connect
  - airport runways & taxiways still block at-grade crossings

Built on the official modding API. Turn it off in Settings → Mods to snap back to vanilla.
